{{Quote|Doogal Belstar is at the top of our current most wanted list, here on Naboo. He leads the Mauler Disciples. I want you to see if you can track him down for us.|[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Gregar Typho/Legends|Typho]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:TMPW" />}}
The '''Capture of Doogal Belstar''' was an operation carried out by the local [[Keren/Legends|Keren]] police force with the aid of agents of the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]] commanded by [[Gregar Typho/Legends|Typho]].

==Background==
{{Quote|I'm pretty sure I saw Doogal putting something by that gravestone over there. Maybe you should look around and see what's there.|Officer [[Nok (Ithorian)|Nok]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:TMPW" />}}
The criminal organization known as the [[Maulers]] posed a serious threat to the peaceful citizens of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] in the early days of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. One of their number was [[Doogal Belstar]], who at that time was the most wanted men on Naboo.<ref name="SWG:TMPW" /> The otherwise undermanned [[Royal Security Police Force]] force having been bolstered with the same RSF agents who successfully had [[Raid on the Skaak Tipper Hideout|raided]] the [[Skaak Tippers]] and killed one of their prominent [[Jonni Skaak|leaders]],<ref name="SWG:Ttb">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Tipping the balance|Naboo}}</ref> Typho decided to attempt to capture Doogal.<ref name="SWG:TMPW" />

==The operation==
[[File:Mauler-camp.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The [[Mauler Apprentice Camp]].]]
{{Quote|The concealed package mentions the meeting point for Doogal and his troops. Go there and take care of him before he gears up!|Captain Typho, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:TMPW" />}}
Typho suspected that the Maulers might know the whereabouts of Belstar and sent the RSF agents to see if they could get any information out of a group of Mauler Apprentices. The effort resulted in fighting between the RSF agents and some of the Maulers around the [[Mauler Apprentice Camp]]. Then, having defeated the Maulers, the RSF agents found a map of Naboo with a location marked. The RSF agents met up with RSF Officer [[Nok (Ithorian)|Nok]] who informed them that Belstar had been seen doing something near that location, and thus they might find further information regarding Belstar's whereabouts on that location, a cemetery near [[Keren/Legends|Keren]]. At the location they found a package revealing Belstar's location. Traveling to the location, they encountered Belstar. Aggressive as he was, they saw no option but to defeat him in battle, and managed to kill him and a number of other Maulers before returning to Typho.<ref name="SWG:TMPW" />

[[File:NokCemetary.jpg|200px|thumb|Officer [[Nok (Ithorian)|Nok]] at the small Nabooian cemetery.]]

==Aftermath==
{{Quote|Doogal is finished, that's good. We may have to update our most wanted list now, see who's next in line for our attention.|Captain Typho, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:TMPW" />}}
Despite this setback, the Maulers continued their criminal activities, and the RSF agents were sent on a number of missions to thwart them,<ref name="SWG:TSI" /><ref name="SWG:TSE" /> before being placed under the command of [[Pooja Naberrie/Legends|Pooja Naberrie]].<ref name="SWG:RtPN">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Report to Pooja Naberrie|Naboo}}</ref>
